mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teaching_class (class_code, course_id, academic_year_id, capacity, selected_count, location, schedule, status) VALUES (#{class_code}, #{course_id}, #{academic_year_id}, #{capacity}, #{selected_count}, #{location}, #{schedule}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE teaching_class SET class_code = #{class_code}, course_id = #{course_id}, academic_year_id = #{academic_year_id}, capacity = #{capacity}, selected_count = #{selected_count}, location = #{location}, schedule = #{schedule}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT tc.*, c.course_name, c.course_code, ay.year as academic_year_name, ay.semester, ct.teacher_name, ct.teacher_id FROM teaching_class tc LEFT JOIN course c ON tc.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN academic_year ay ON tc.academic_year_id = ay.id LEFT JOIN course_teacher ct ON tc.id = ct.teaching_class_id AND ct.is_main_teacher = 1 WHERE tc.id = #{id}

SELECT tc.*, c.course_name, c.course_code, ct.teacher_name, ct.teacher_id FROM teaching_class tc LEFT JOIN course c ON tc.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN course_teacher ct ON tc.id = ct.teaching_class_id AND ct.is_main_teacher = 1 WHERE tc.academic_year_id = #{academic_year_id}

SELECT tc.*, c.course_name, c.course_code, c.credit, ct.teacher_name, ct.teacher_id FROM teaching_class tc LEFT JOIN course c ON tc.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN course_teacher ct ON tc.id = ct.teaching_class_id AND ct.is_main_teacher = 1 WHERE tc.academic_year_id = #{academic_year_id} AND tc.status = 1 AND tc.selected_count < tc.capacity
